scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera in a softly lit, neutral indoor setting to create an intimate and natural atmosphere. The camera is on a tripod with a slight slow push-in as the model begins speaking. After the first sentence, cut to a close-up of the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle held naturally in the model’s right hand, with the label clearly visible. Then cut back to the medium shot, with the product still in her hand near her face as she finishes. The depth of field remains shallow to keep the focus on the model and the product, gently blurring the background throughout.
scene_1.dialogue: もっと早くこれをやっていればよかったです。長年、髪を傷めるだけの乱雑な白髪染めに悩んでいました。それからKYOGOKUカラーシャンプーに出会いました。これは白髪をカバーしながら髪を健康的に保ってくれます。
